records.question: Where is the location in UT with the address 316 S. State St that has a Manager hired on 1/29/91 requiring a 4 year degree whose performance is Poor?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT location.locationid FROM location
JOIN employee ON location.locationid = employee.locationid
JOIN position ON employee.positionid = position.positionid
WHERE location.address = '316 S. State St' AND position.positiontitle = 'Manager' AND employee.hiredate = '1/29/91' AND position.educationrequired = '4 year degree' AND employee.performance = 'Poor' AND location.state = 'UT'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT location.locationID 
FROM location 
JOIN employee ON location.locationID = employee.locationID 
JOIN position ON employee.positionID = position.positionID 
WHERE location.state = 'UT' 
  AND location.address = '316 S. State St' 
  AND employee.hiredate = '1991-01-29' 
  AND position.positiontitle = 'Manager' 
  AND position.educationrequired = '4 year degree' 
  AND employee.performance = 'Poor'

records.question: Which locations in Atlanta have a zipcode of at least 30316?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT location.locationid FROM location
WHERE location.zipcode >= 30316 AND location.locationcity = 'Atlanta'
records.pred_sql: SELECT locationID FROM location WHERE locationcity = 'Atlanta' AND zipcode >= 30316

records.question: Which locations have employees with the last name Coulter who were hired exactly on 2/14/93?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT location.locationid FROM location
JOIN employee ON location.locationid = employee.locationid
JOIN position ON employee.positionid = position.positionid
WHERE employee.hiredate = '2/14/93' AND employee.lastname = 'Coulter'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT location.locationID
FROM employee
JOIN location ON employee.locationID = location.locationID
WHERE employee.lastname = 'Coulter' AND employee.hiredate = '2/14/93'

JOIN employee ON location.locationid = employee.locationid
WHERE location.zipcode = 30316 AND employee.lastname = 'Coulter' AND employee.performance = 'Good' AND location.state = 'GA' AND employee.hiredate = '2/14/93'
